lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੁ ਨ ਚੀਨਹਿ ਬੰਨਹਿ ਪੰਡ ਪਰਾਲਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tat na cheeneh baneh pandd paraalaa |2|
lines.english: They do not understand the essence of reality, and they gather their worthless bundles of straw. ||2||
The self-willed manmukhs, in ignorance, take the path of evil.
Driven crazy, infatuated by Maya, they call themselves Pandits - religious scholars;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਬਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਬਹੁ ਕਰਮ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har naam bisaariaa bahu karam drirraae |
lines.english: They forget the Lord's Name, and in its place, they establish all sorts of rituals.
They drown in the terrifying world-ocean, in the love of duality. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਕਾ ਗਲਿ ਜੇਵੜਾ ਨਿਤ ਕਾਲੁ ਸੰਤਾਵੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jam kaa gal jevarraa nit kaal santaavai |4|
lines.english: The noose of the Messenger of Death is around their necks; they are constantly tormented by death. ||4||
The Messenger of Death does not even approach the Gurmukhs.
stained with corruption, they suffer terrible pain.
Attuned to the Name, they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਦਾਸੀ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa daasee bhagataa kee kaar kamaavai |
lines.english: Maya is the slave of the Lord's devotees; it works for them.
Through the Word of the Shabad, they burn away their ego and duality.
He is forever immaculate; he is absorbed in intuitive peace. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਥਾ ਸੁਣਹਿ ਸੇ ਧਨਵੰਤ ਦਿਸਹਿ ਜੁਗ ਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: har kathaa suneh se dhanavant diseh jug maahee |
lines.english: Those who listen to the Lord's Sermon are seen to be the wealthy people in this world.
One who falls at their feet attains the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਗੁਣ ਰਵਹਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਮਨ ਮਾਹੀ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sahaje gun raveh saache man maahee |7|
lines.english: They intuitively savor the Glories of the True Lord within their minds. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਸਭਿ ਨਿਵਹਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਪੂਜ ਕਰਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: tin kau sabh niveh anadin pooj karaahee |
lines.english: Everyone bows down to them, and adores them, night and day.
O Nanak, subduing egotism, one is absorbed into God. ||8||4||
The Perfect True Guru has revealed the Shabad;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਮੇਟੇ ਚਉਥੈ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun mette chauthai chit laaeaa |
lines.english: it eradicates the three qualities, and attunes the consciousness to the fourth state.
Brahma studied the Vedas, but these lead only to debates and disputes.
Gauree, Third Mehl:
He is filled with darkness; he does not understand himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਉ ਫਿਰਿ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa krau fir kaal na khaae |
lines.english: So serve the Guru, and you shall not be consumed by death.
And yet, if he chants the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he finds God. ||1||
The self-willed manmukhs have been consumed by the love of duality. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੀਧੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh paaeaa gur kai sabad seedhe |2|
lines.english: I have found my God, through the Guru's Shabad, and I have been reformed. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਰੀਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad antar sehaj reedhe |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they find intuitive peace and poise deep within.
Becoming Gurmukh, the sinful mortals are purified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਾਚੇ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: mere prabh saache kai man bhaae |
lines.english: when we become pleasing to the Mind of my True God.
God Himself unites us in Union with the True Guru,
The blind, self-willed manmukhs constantly eat poison.
They sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, in the poise of celestial peace. ||3||
Without the True Guru, they are deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਡੰਡੁ ਸਹਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jam ddandd saheh sadaa dukh paae |4|
lines.english: They are beaten by the Messenger of Death with his rod, and they suffer in constant pain. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮੂਆ ਨ ਜੋਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jamooaa na johai har kee saranaaee |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not catch sight of those who enter the Sanctuary of the Lord.
Subduing egotism, they lovingly center their consciousness on the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sadaa rahai har naam liv laaee |5|
lines.english: They keep their consciousness constantly focused on the Lord's Name. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਸਿਉ ਮਨੁ ਮਿਲਾਇ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਜੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: man siau man milaae sabh jag jeetaa |
lines.english: Merging their minds into the Mind, they conquer the entire world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਪਵਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seveh se jan niramal pavitaa |
lines.english: Those humble beings who serve the True Guru are pure and immaculate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਕੁਸਲੁ ਤੇਰੈ ਮੇਰੇ ਮੀਤਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: ein bidh kusal terai mere meetaa |6|
lines.english: In this way, you too shall find happiness, O my friend. ||6||
Those who serve the True Guru are blessed with fruitful rewards.
The Naam, the Name of the Lord, abides in their hearts; selfishness and conceit depart from within them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਕਵਨੁ ਕਵਨੁ ਨ ਸੀਧੋ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te kavan kavan na seedho mere bhaaee |
lines.english: Who - who has not been purified by the True Guru, O my Siblings of Destiny?
The unstruck melody of the Shabad vibrates for them. ||7||
The devotees are purified, and honored in His Court.
O Nanak, greatness is in the Lord's Name. ||8||5||
Gauree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਵਖਾਣੈ ਭਰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun vakhaanai bharam na jaae |
lines.english: Those who speak of the three qualities - their doubts do not depart.
The True Guru is the Bestower of liberation in this age. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨ ਨ ਤੂਟਹਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bandhan na tootteh mukat na paae |
lines.english: Their bonds are not broken, and they do not obtain liberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਕਾਲੈ ਕੀ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun kaalai kee sir kaaraa |
lines.english: Those who are controlled by the three qualities have death hovering over their heads.
Those mortals who become Gurmukh give up their doubts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj dhun upajai har liv laae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The celestial music wells up, when they lovingly attune their consciousness to the Lord. ||1||Pause||
